rationale: The response contains only the model's internal thinking/planning notes and never delivers an actual finished explainer. The output cuts off mid-sentence during a draft outline. There is no consumer-facing piece to evaluate—no headline, no coherent paragraphs, no actionable guidance in readable form. It fails the task entirely.
